text: You arrive at a quiet sector. Friendly traders acknowledge you with a wave over the comms. The star system is peaceful and uneventful — a rare luxury in these dangerous times.
Your sensors pick up a distress beacon from a drifting ship. Scans show no life signs — the crew is long gone. The hull is still largely intact and holds salvageable materials.

choices.text: Leave it — could be a trap.

text: An armed Rebel patrol vessel drops out of FTL directly ahead. Your hails go unanswered. Warning klaxons blare as they lock weapons onto your ship. There is nowhere to hide.

choices.text: Attempt to escape at full burn.

text: A Federation emergency supply cache drifts at the edge of the system. The access codes are standard issue — clearly meant to be used by vessels in need. Your crew looks to you for the call.

choices.text: Leave it for someone who needs it more.

text: Your sensors detect an anomalous signal emanating from a nearby gas giant. The signature matches a Federation automated beacon. It could be nothing — or it could be exactly what you need.
